user.title: Add Minecraft Server
user.description:
Set up a new Minecraft server to receive webhook data.

This integration is designed to work with **CC: Tweaked** computers in Minecraft using the [minecraft-ha-cc](https://github.com/tyler919/minecraft-ha-cc) companion scripts. Any system that can send HTTP POST requests with JSON will also work.

After setup you will get a webhook URL to paste into the scanner setup wizard.

data_description.server_name: A friendly name for this Minecraft server (e.g. 'Survival', 'Creative')

error.server_exists: A server with this name already exists

init.title: Minecraft Server Configuration
init.description:
**Webhook URL:**
`{webhook_url}`

Paste this URL into your CC: Tweaked scanner setup wizard, or configure any other HTTP client to POST JSON to it.

**Webhook ID:** `{webhook_id}`

data_description.error_reporting: Automatically open a GitHub issue on the minecraft-ha repo when the integration encounters an unexpected error. Requires a GitHub token below.
data_description.github_token: A GitHub PAT with 'public_repo' scope used to create issues automatically. Leave blank if error reporting is disabled.
